title: ATS (All The Screams)
description: A lightweight horror modpack to play with friends
body:
##  This is a silly little modpack for screaming with your friends!!!
### Also thank you for 200 downloads! Sorry for updates being slow I am currently working on adding more mods and making a new update

[Check Out Our NEW Discord For Updates, Sneak Peeks, And More!!!](https://discord.gg/76ggnMFPgd)

### Mods And Shaders:
The Silence,
e4mc,
True Darkness [Forge] - 1.20 Port,
The Midnight Lurker,
The Man From The Fog,
The Knocker,
The John Mod Reborn,
The Box Of Horrors,
Simple Voice Chat,
RetroVision,
Paranoia (Horror),
PSX Shader,
Oculus,
Nyf's Spiders,
MC VHS,
Insanity Shader,
Hysteria Shaders,
GeckoLib,
From The Fog,
Flashlight Shader,
Epoch,
Embeddium,
Body Camera Shader,
Distant Friends,
Sanity: Descent Into Madness,
Doctor Who - Weeping Angels,
Day Counter (Original),
[EMF] Entity Model Features,
[ETF] Entity Texture Features,
Citadel,
Fresh Animations,
Dynamic Lights,
Nooby's Tropics: Night,
000.jar,
In Your World,
The Anomaly
